title: Potion Of Luck
body:
Makes the unused Luck and Bad Luck potions obtainable in survival Minecraft

even tho its just luck 1 you can realy get some good stuff from
- Mob Drops
- Loot chests
- Trail chamber vaults
- and fishing:)

you brew the potions with
- A poppy for the unlucky potion
- A emerald for the luck
